compile.note: model_id is pinned in Stage 3 when the real Anthropic client is wired; null in the hand-authored Stage 1 artifact.

dpp4_glp1_within_8_weeks.pinned: within 8 weeks == drug start within 56 days before index

recompile_equality: Gate 4 requires the recompiled artifact to be byte-identical; the compiler-side recompile check is wired in Stage 2.
serialization: canonical JSON: sorted keys, 2-space indent, LF newline, trailing newline.

uln.source: Common clinical reference upper normal limit ~40 U/L for AST/ALT; 3x ULN = 120 U/L. Chosen and documented, not authoritative.
